reviews.review_description:
I like word games and was very excited to try this and in principle it has all the elements I like....anagrams, time limits, 3D interaction but something is missing for me and I'm not quite sure what it is. I think I need a bit more obvious jeopardy to motivate me. Maybe make the ticking clock bigger and flashy rewards rather than a lonesome chime. I do like the hand-tracking element but you have to be very precise when moving the letters. I find I keep moving the box/cube, which is annoying but that's probably down to my lack of experience with hand-tracking.

So overall, it's fun but not engaging enough for me to get excited about.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! I agree, making success (and failure) more interesting is on my to do list. I'm working on some new updates coming soon, including some better effects and sounds. I appreciate you sharing your thoughts.

As for hand tracking, there's a neat trick to lock the puzzle: if you put both your hands out in front of your palms facing away (in a "STOP" kind of way) the puzzle will lock so you can't accidentaly grab it! Do the same to unlock it.

reviews.review_description:
My wife and I love playing Wordle online. When I saw Wordomi, I had to buy it. It’s basically the same thing but an extra “crossword” option. Love the horizontal/vertical concept as well. 

I think what would make me give it 5 stars is if there were more bells and whistles. Meaning special effects or quests of some kind? 

Other than that, I love the updates. More clean cut cubes and refresh rate, WotD, bonuses etc. 

Keep up the good work devs.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the lovely feedback, really makes my day. There are some BIG updates dropping early 2026, so stay tuned. Including some bells and whistles!

reviews.review_title: Luck based game, not a logic puzzle
reviews.review_description:
Final Update: Tried playing again and this game just isn't for me. As the dev said in their response this is similar to wordle but since there are multiple words in each puzzle with a hard limit of misses it feels less like a puzzle to solve and more like a guessing game. I really enjoy wordle but this doesn't scratch the same itch for me at all.

This would be a 5 star game if they fixed the issues.

Edit: I will try the game again with the “Wordle” mindset as the dev suggested and come back with another take on it. End edit.

The downfall of an otherwise amazing game is that it’s just a guessing game. Unlike crosswords where it gives you clues, there are no clues for you to guess which word to enter. There are just x number of letters for you to use and many possible solutions. For example, if you have the letters EABVRY and the solution is a 4 letter word it could be “very”, “bear”, “bare”, “year”, “bray”, “verb”, “rave”, or “aver”. You have 3 attempts to guess the one the game wants you to use and if you don’t get it you lose.

Edit 2: Ignore this part between the asterisks, the dev corrected me. Please look at their response below. **On top of that there is no tutorial telling you how to interpret the results though it’s pretty straight forward. Green means correct letter in the correct position, red means correct letter in wrong position, gray means incorrect letter. The lack of tutorial made me have to figure out it was a guessing game though.** End edit 2.

I love the idea, and the mechanics and MR are spot on. It’s easy to manipulate the puzzle when you need to move it and it works wonderfully with pinching your fingers. It’s a very “cozy” game outside of the frustration of getting the answer wrong when there is no indication of what word you’re supposed to use which makes it a very UNcozy game.

If they implemented a clue system like crosswords, or better yet had an option to use traditional clues or cryptic clues it would be 5 stars.

If the dev(s) read this I think the idea is great, but the implementation is poor. Word puzzles shouldn’t be luck based and that is where this game fails. I would absolutely love this game if there was a clear cut right and wrong answer (by way of clues, for example) but as it stands, it is purely luck and it is more frustrating than fun when you just have to guess the word you want me to choose.

This is a game I want! I beg you to implement these changes because it’s a perfect use of MR for word puzzles. It’s a wonderful idea and it’s so close to being a perfect MR crossword experience but it falls hard on the fact it’s a guessing game rather than a logic puzzle.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for checking out the game again. Clues were added to the game about 6 months ago, if you can make sure the game is updated. And the most recent big update "Lexicon Expanded" added much better clues that are very similar to crosswords, clearer dictionnary definitions and many more words! More exciting updates to come very soon.

reviews.review_description: This seems to be a  mix of Wordle and Crosswords, It’s a relaxing, tactile word puzzle. There are a variety of modes and  and puzzles (100+ puzzles, 200+ challenges), this one of those games that you can lose the track of time playing, an excellent game and one worthy of adding to your library

a little wordle a little crossword. I enjoy the game but the handtracking gets a little weird sometimes. I like it but need to invest more time into it. Relaxing fun but don't like that the words are just a guess.

reviews.review_title: Fun puzzle game that uses MR
reviews.review_description:
I won a free key, but this is worth the play. Using MR and hand tracking is fun, but calls for a well lit space for sure. Word puzzles are fun, the difficulty ramps up pretty hard.

I’m liking it!

reviews.review_title: How Do I Use the Touch Controllers?
reviews.review_description: Product description says it works with the touch controllers as well as with the hand controllers.   My hands feel clumsy; knocks the blocks over and keeps moving things around.  I prefer to use the controllers.  How do I get them to work?  I can’t get them to activate with this game.  Please help.

This is a fun puzzle game that works very well. Check out my review.


https://youtu.be/XuwjKTSrIM0
Try this challenging game. It’s a lot of fun! The 3D gameplay is easy to control and fun to manipulate. Well worth the low cost.

A screen pops up saying that we will be using hand tracking then press A. Pressing A does nothing. Tried reinstalling but got the same issue. 

Update:  Thanks for the quick response! I finally figured it out. It is a fun game with nice hand tracking. An enjoyable game to relax and play.

developer_response.body: Hi! The message means you need to switch to hand tracking and "press a button to start", which is one of the two buttons hovering under that message with your fingers. It's not "press (A) button to start". Enjoy!

reviews.review_description:
I received this as a gift and wanted to try it out real quick to see how I would enjoy it. 5 minutes I thought... but I played for an hour before I realized I needed to stop and get some stuff done. But through the rest of the day, all I was thinking about was how well the game was and ready to get back in to play.
It is a relaxing puzzler and the hand controls are very well implemented. Puzzles start off easy but get harder and add additional dimensions as you go through the game.
Reminded me a lot of wordle, which was fun, but this takes it up to the next level!

Fantastic word puzzle game. My wife is not a big gamer but loves wordle and she loved playing this. The pass-through allowed her to sit on the couch and play while still interacting with me. Good hand tracking. Only critique would be the red coloring of "right letter wrong spot" took some getting used too. At first I kept thinking the red just meant I had the wrong letter entirely. If you like wordle this is a perfect game for you.

Recently played this on the quest 3. The mixed reality and hand tracking is a perfect application for this game! 

I like how it can switch from a serious challenge or just relaxing fun depending on the mode you pick. 

It has enough variations to last a long time, making this game a good deal for the price. 

If you like puzzle and word games, this is an easy pick to add to your VR library.
My wife had a lot of fun playing with this game in mixed reality with hand controls!

I'm really enjoying this game. The hand tracking works really well and it's nice to play in MR, it's fun to cast the screen and play with some friends. I look forward to seeing how the game develops over time!
This game perfectly uses the ability that mixed reality presents devs. It’s a very fun and unique take to the wordle experience!!!

reviews.review_title: My first game with mixed reality
reviews.review_description: Its pretty good word puzzle game with mixed reality and hand tracking.

Our daughter has been doing Wordle with all her friends, so we thought it would be fun to try this out for her. Turned out the rest of us enjoyed it too! A lot of reviews already mentioned it, but we have fun casting it and working on it together. The developer jut released a new update and added some stuff, so we're looking forward to checking that out. Good sign for the future if they are already adding more to it.
Give it a shot. Could use another mode or two.

reviews.review_title: Get this if you enjoy word games
reviews.review_description: Extremely fun combination between Wordle and Scrabble. The hand tracking works amazing and with pass-through in the Quest 3 it feels very comfortable. It's relaxing and entertaining T the same time.
